info.name: IndicF5 TTS API
info.description: Functional API wrapping ai4bharat/IndicF5 — synthesizes Bengali (and other Indic-language) text into playable speech.

request.description: Liveness check + whether the model is currently loaded in memory.
Eagerly loads the model into memory instead of waiting for the first /tts call. First call downloads ~1-2GB of gated model weights and can take a few minutes.
Lists available preset voices and their reference transcripts.

formdata.value: আমার সোনার বাংলা, আমি তোমায় ভালোবাসি।

request.description: Synthesizes Bengali text using one of the bundled preset voices. Returns audio/wav bytes directly — Postman will offer to preview/play or save the response as a file.

formdata.value: বাংলাদেশ একটি সুন্দর দেশ। এখানে অনেক নদী আছে।

formdata.description: Upload a short reference audio clip (wav) whose voice/prosody will be cloned

formdata.value: Transcript of the uploaded ref_audio clip goes here.
formdata.description: Exact transcript of ref_audio (required when ref_audio is supplied)

request.description: Synthesizes Bengali text by cloning a voice from an uploaded reference clip + its transcript, instead of using a preset voice. Select a file for ref_audio before sending.
